text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I messed up...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: But a minor injury like this'll heal up in a jiffy!
choice_data_list:
You should get some proper rest, even if it is
minor.

There's that youthful resilience! Let's get back
to training!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You're such a worrywart, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You're such a worrywart, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But that just shows how much you care. And here I
go, making you worry again...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: No, it's not okay! I don't want to stress you out.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
From the very bottom of my young, trendy
heart—my bad.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Worn out from all the emotions, Maruzensky gets
some rest so she can be ready for the next race.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You better believe it! ♪ Lay some more pep talk
on me, Trainer!
choice_data_list:
Maruzensky, the most bodacious Umamusume
on the planet, doesn't even have the word
"tired" in her dictionary!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh my goodness, Trainer! You sweet-talking
flatterer, you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh my goodness, Trainer! You sweet-talking
flatterer, you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Heehee, now you've got me all fired up. Time to
get back to training!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I'll show you my best, fastest, most fresh run ever!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ugh, ow ow ow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her symptons having worsened, we decide that
she should rest until her injury heals.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
One, two, three, four! This is easy, give me
more! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Five, six, seven, eight! I'm good to go, I just can't
wait! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: What do you think, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: What do you think, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Riiight?! And here's an even more slammin' stride
just for you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky looks happy as she continues
jogging.
